Professional Vertical Banner Stands for Trade Show & Event Displays

Our Vertical Banner Stand includes complete hardware with dual 24" x 72" full-color banners and two 24" x 18" sign toppers for maximum display impact. This professional display solution works perfectly for indoor trade shows, promotional events, and business presentations.

The vertical banner stand features durable steel base plates that provide exceptional stability in high-traffic environments. The unique dual-banner design supports two 2' × 6' banners plus sign toppers that extend above the 6' banners for enhanced visibility and advertising space.

Each banner stand accommodates custom full-color printing on professional vinyl materials, allowing you to showcase your brand, promotions, or event information with crisp, vibrant graphics that attract attention from across the room.

Complete Kit Includes:

  • Professional steel banner stand hardware
  • Two 24" x 72" custom printed banners
  • Two 24" x 18" sign toppers
  • Assembly instructions and hardware
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Materials for Indoor Display Stands

Choose from two professional vinyl materials specifically selected for banner stand displays. Both materials provide excellent print quality and durability for indoor use.

13 oz Vinyl Banners for Banner Stand Displays

Our standard 13 oz vinyl offers excellent print quality and flexibility for banner stand applications. This material works perfectly for most indoor display needs and provides vibrant color reproduction with a smooth finish that enhances graphic visibility.

18 oz Heavy Duty Vinyl for Long-Term Banner Stand Use

Our premium 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl features a matte finish with blockout coating for superior durability and print quality. This material resists wear and maintains color vibrancy through extended use at multiple events.

4mm Coroplast Sign Toppers for Enhanced Visibility

The included coroplast sign toppers provide rigid display surfaces that extend your messaging above the main banners. These lightweight yet durable toppers ensure your most important information remains visible at eye level.

Material Features:

  • Full-color digital printing capability
  • Indoor-optimized durability
  • Professional matte or gloss finish options
  • Compatible with standard banner stand hardware
PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Finishing Options for Professional Display

Our vertical banner stands come with professional finishing designed specifically for display stand applications and easy setup.

Banner Finishing:

  • Clean edge cutting for precise banner stand fitting
  • Corner reinforcement for durability during setup
  • Professional hemming available upon request
  • Grommets positioned for optimal banner stand mounting

Sign Topper Finishing:

  • Precision-cut coroplast for exact hardware fit
  • Smooth edges for professional appearance
  • Pre-drilled mounting holes when required
  • Weather-resistant coating for longevity

Hardware Specifications:

  • Heavy-duty steel base plates for stability
  • Adjustable banner mounting system
  • Tool-free assembly design
  • Compact storage capability between events
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Vertical Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production schedules to meet your event deadlines and budget requirements.

Standard 3-Day Production Schedule

Our standard production timeline delivers your complete vertical banner stand kit within 3 business days of artwork approval. This option includes full-color printing of both banners and sign toppers, plus quality inspection before shipping.

Economy 5-Day Production Option

Choose our economy timeline for cost savings when you have flexible event scheduling. This 5-day production window maintains the same quality standards while offering budget-friendly pricing.

Production Schedule Notes:

  • Orders received after 5PM CST process the following business day
  • Production begins after artwork approval
  • Weekend and holiday orders process on the next business day
  • Rush production available for urgent deadlines

Quality Control Process:

  • Pre-production artwork review and approval
  • Print quality inspection for color accuracy
  • Hardware functionality testing
  • Complete kit verification before shipping

Trade Show & Event Applications for Vertical Banner Stands

Vertical banner stands provide versatile display solutions for numerous indoor applications where professional presentation matters.

Trade Show Applications:

  • Booth entrance displays to attract visitor attention
  • Product showcase presentations with detailed information
  • Company branding displays at exhibition halls
  • Directional signage for booth navigation

Corporate Events:

  • Conference welcome displays and registration areas
  • Speaker introduction banners for presentations
  • Company milestone celebrations and achievements
  • Employee recognition displays

Retail & Business Locations:

  • Store promotions and seasonal campaigns
  • New product launch announcements
  • Grand opening and special event signage
  • Customer information displays

Educational & Non-Profit Uses:

  • School event displays and fundraising campaigns
  • Community organization presentations
  • Health fair and awareness campaign displays
  • Graduation and ceremony displays

The dual-banner design with sign toppers maximizes your message visibility while maintaining a professional appearance that enhances your brand presentation.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vertical Banner Stand Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Follow these specifications to ensure optimal print quality for your vertical banner stand graphics.

File Format Requirements:

  • PDF (preferred for vector graphics and text)
  • High-resolution JPEG or PNG (300 DPI minimum)
  • Adobe Illustrator files (.AI) with outlined fonts
  • Photoshop files (.PSD) with flattened layers

Banner Dimensions & Setup:

  • Main banners: 24" wide × 72" high (plus 0.125" bleed)
  • Sign toppers: 24" wide × 18" high (plus 0.125" bleed)
  • Resolution: 150 DPI at full size for optimal quality
  • Color mode: CMYK for accurate print reproduction

Design Guidelines:

  • Keep important text and graphics 0.5" from edges
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum visibility
  • Consider viewing distance when selecting font sizes
  • Maintain consistent branding across both banners

Multiple Artwork Submission:

  • Include order notes when submitting multiple design files
  • Clearly label files for main banners vs. sign toppers
  • Our team will contact you to coordinate artwork placement
  • Artwork approval required before production begins

Design Services Available:

  • Professional design assistance for custom layouts
  • Template customization with your content
  • Artwork revision and optimization services
  • Brand consistency consultation
PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Vertical Banner Stands for Your Business

Ready to create professional displays that command attention at your next trade show or event? Our vertical banner stands deliver maximum impact with dual banners and sign toppers that showcase your message from multiple angles.

Every banner stand kit includes professional steel hardware, custom full-color printing, and everything needed for immediate setup. Choose from our template designs or upload your artwork for completely custom displays that reflect your brand.

Your Complete Banner Stand Package:

  • Durable steel banner stand hardware built for repeated use
  • Two 24" × 72" custom printed banners
  • Two 24" × 18" sign toppers for enhanced visibility
  • Professional vinyl materials with vibrant color printing
  • Assembly instructions and all mounting hardware

Select your banner material, choose your design method, and specify your quantity above. Our team handles the printing and assembly so your banner stands arrive ready for immediate use.

Questions about artwork requirements, shipping timelines, or bulk order pricing? Contact our banner stand specialists at 866.419.7446 for personalized assistance with your display needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Vertical Banner Stands

What's included with the vertical banner stand?

Each kit includes the steel banner stand hardware, two 24" × 72" custom printed banners, two 24" × 18" sign toppers, assembly instructions, and all mounting hardware needed for setup.

How stable is the banner stand hardware?

Our vertical banner stands feature heavy steel base plates designed for stability in high-traffic areas. The hardware supports dual banners plus sign toppers without tipping or movement during normal use.

Can I use different artwork on each banner?

Yes, you can use different designs on each banner and sign topper. When placing your order, include a note about multiple artwork files, and our team will contact you to coordinate the artwork submission process.

What's the difference between 13 oz and 18 oz vinyl?

The 13 oz vinyl is our standard material suitable for most indoor displays. The 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl offers enhanced durability with a matte finish and blockout coating, ideal for frequent use and long-term displays.

How long does production take?

Standard production is 3 business days, with an economy 5-day option available. Production begins after artwork approval, and orders received after 5PM CST process the following business day.

Is assembly required for the banner stand?

Yes, some assembly is required, but the process is designed to be tool-free and straightforward. Complete instructions are included, and assembly typically takes 15-30 minutes per stand.

Can the banner stand be used outdoors?

This banner stand is designed primarily for indoor use. While the vinyl materials can withstand some outdoor conditions, the hardware is optimized for indoor trade shows, events, and retail environments.

What file formats do you accept for artwork?

We accept PDF, high-resolution JPEG/PNG (300 DPI), Adobe Illustrator (.AI), and Photoshop (.PSD) files. Files should be set up at full size with 0.125" bleed and CMYK color mode.

Do you offer volume discounts for multiple banner stands?

Yes, volume pricing is available for larger quantities. Contact our sales team at 866.419.7446 to discuss pricing for multiple banner stand orders and business account options.

How do I submit artwork for multiple components?

When your order includes multiple artwork files (main banners and sign toppers), include a note in the order comments. Our team will reach out with instructions for submitting and organizing your artwork files.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
